file.content:
# 2D-Systolic-Array-Multiplier

This repository implements a two dimensional systolic array that can be
configured to multiply 2 square matrices of 2 < dimensions < 17.

The `rtl` sub-directory contains the RTL written in System Verilog and the `tb`
sub-directory contains the test bench written in C++ and simulated using
Verilator.

## TL;DR

Requirements: `Verilator` and `GNU Make`.

To simulate the TB generating random NxN input matrices, driving the DUT ports
and displaying the result matrix generated by the DUT:

1. Clone the repository:
```
git clone https://github.com/tms4517/2D-Systolic-Array-Multiplier.git
```
2. Run the simulation:

By default the RTL and TB are configured to a matrix size of 4x4.

To modify the default matrix size: `cd rtl`, open `topSystolicArray.sv` and
modify the paramater `N`. And, `cd tb`, open `tb_topSystolicArray.sv` and modify
the macro `N`.

```
cd tb && make all
```

## Introduction

### Systolic architectures

(describe and explain seminal paper: "Why Systolic Architectures?": https://www.cse.wustl.edu/~roger/560M.f17/01653825.pdf)

### Existing implementations

(describe Google's TPU. Blog: https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/ai-machine-learning/an-in-depth-look-at-googles-first-tensor-processing-unit-tpu. Paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1704.04760.pdf)

## Design Outline

Interfacing to the top level module - `topSystolicArray.sv` has been kept simple.
Besides `i_clk` and `i_arst`, there are two input ports to drive the matrices A
and B - `i_a` and `i_b`. These ports are sampled, when the input port
`i_validInput` is asserted. The input matrices are then transformed and passed
to the systolic array for multiplication. When the matrix multiplication has
completed, output port `o_validResult` is asserted and the result matrix - `o_c`
can be sampled.

The waveform below shows the interface being exercised.
![Interface](images/interface.png)

The elements of the input matrices are 8 bit integers. This was chosen out of
simplicity and provides an appropriate level of accuracy for neural network
calculations, as described in Google's TPU blog post. Furthermore, the elements
of the output matrix are set to 32 bits. This was chosen out of convenience for
verifying any NxN input matrix in the range 2 < N < 17.

The overall steps involved in performing the matrix multiplication using the
systolic array follows the steps outlined in this YouTube video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cmy7LBaWuZ8 and are described below.
To align to it and make it easier to follow the steps, a 4x4 matrix will be used
as example.

### Set-up the row and column matrices

When `i_validInput` is asserted the input matrices are transformed and
registered into 'row' and 'column' matrices as shown below. For each row of
matrix `i_a`, the position of the elements are reversed, zeros are appended to
the MSB of the rows and each row is right shifted accordingly to form the 'row'
matrix. Each column of matrix `i_b` is transformed into a row, zeros are
appended to the MSB of the rows and each row is right shifted accordingly to
form the 'column' matrix.

![Input to row/column matrix transformation](images/matrixTransformation.svg)

### Pass the elements from the row and column matrices to the systolic array

The elements in the first column of the row matrix are connected to the
horizontal inputs of the systolic array. And, the elements in the first column
of the column matrix are connected to the vertical inputs of the systolic array.
This is shown below.

![Row/Column matrices connected to PEs](images/connectToPEs.svg)

At every clock cycle of the multiplication process, the row and column matrices
are left shifted by 1 element to load new values into the systolic array. The
waveform below shows the signals on the horizontal and vertical ports of the
systolic array being loaded with new values at every clock cycle. After, 10
(3N-2) clock cycles the multiplication is complete.

![PE input sequence](images/inputSequence.png)

The `README.md` file in the `rtl` sub-directory contains implementation specific
details.

## Verification Outline

A basic C++ test bench consisting of several functions to implement a specific
task was created. The test outline is show below:

0. Assert the asynchronous reset.

Loop {

  1. Assert `i_validInput`
  2. Create random NxN matrices
  3. Drive the input ports `i_a` and `i_b` with these matrices
  4. When `o_validResult` is asserted
  5. Calculate the expected result matrix
  6. Verify that `o_c` is equal to the result matrix, if it isn't raise an error
  7. Wait for a few clock cycles

}

The simulation prints out the input matrices and the expected result matrix. If
an error occurs, the output matrix received will also be printed and the
simulation will end.

The `README.md` file in the `tb` sub-directory contains implementation specific
details.

## Further Work

### Synthesize and target an FPGA

**Open source flows**

The RTL makes use of packed data types for ease of coding and to make it easier
for others to understand the code. However, packed data types are not supported
by a widely used open source tool - Yosys. Yosys is used for converting SV code
into a  gate-level representation that can be used for further stages of the
digital design flow, such as optimization, placement, and routing. Open source
RTL-> GDSII flows (ASIC) such as the Open Lane project and RTL->Bitsream flows
(FPGA) make use of this tool.

In the future, I plan on forking the project and unpacking all the data types.

**Intel Quartus Prime**

The RTL was compiled using Quartus Prime to target a Cyclone V FPGA and the
resource utilization for a 2x2 and 4x4 systolic array is shown below.

![2x2Resource](images/2x2Resource.png)

![4x4Resource](images/4x4Resource.png)

The number of DSP units utilised correspond to the number of PEs instantiated in
each systolic array respectively.

Note: Quartus only supports SystemVerilog 2005 so the syntax of the for loops
needs to be amended to compile the design.

**Interface module to a custom SIMD processor**

It would be interesting to create a SIMD processor with custom instructions that
can fetch the input matrices from memory, and drive the input ports of the top
level module. The processor would then wait for a few clock cycles for the
result to be calculated. It would then read the output ports of the top level
module and write the result back to memory.

*STATUS: RTL & TB complete. Documentation in progress.*

1	// This module implements a Processing Element (PE). It performs an 8-bit
2	// multiply-accumulate operation.
3	
4	`default_nettype none
5	
6	module pe
7	  ( input  var logic        i_clk
8	  , input  var logic        i_arst
9	
10	  , input  var logic        i_doProcess
11	
12	  , input  var logic [7:0]  i_a
13	  , input  var logic [7:0]  i_b
14	
15	  , output var logic [7:0]  o_a
16	  , output var logic [7:0]  o_b
17	  , output var logic [31:0] o_y
18	  );
19	
20	  // {{{ MAC
21	
22	  logic [31:0] mult;
23	
24	  always_comb
25	    mult = i_a*i_b;
26	
27	  logic [31:0] mac_d, mac_q;
28	
29	  always_ff @(posedge i_clk, posedge i_arst)
30	    if (i_arst)
31	      mac_q <= '0;
32	    else
33	      mac_q <= mac_d;
34	
35	  always_comb
36	    mac_d = (i_doProcess) ? mac_q + mult : '0;
37	
38	  always_comb
39	    o_y = mac_q;
40	
41	  // }}} MAC
42	
43	  // {{{ Register inputs and assign them to outputs
44	
45	  logic [7:0] a_q, b_q;
46	
47	  always_ff @(posedge i_clk, posedge i_arst)
48	    if (i_arst)
49	      a_q <= '0;
50	    else if (i_doProcess)
51	      a_q <= i_a;
52	    else
53	      a_q <= a_q;
54	
55	  always_ff @(posedge i_clk, posedge i_arst)
56	    if (i_arst)
57	      b_q <= '0;
58	    else if (i_doProcess)
59	      b_q <= i_b;
60	    else
61	      b_q <= b_q;
62	
63	  always_comb
64	    o_a = a_q;
65	
66	  always_comb
67	    o_b = b_q;
68	
69	  // }}} Register inputs and assign them to outputs
70	
71	endmodule
72	
73	`resetall
74

1	// This module interconnects the PEs to form a systolic array. Below, is an
2	// example of how PEs in a 4x4 systolic array are interconnected. The horizontal
3	// lines represent row interconnects, and the vertical lines represent column
4	// interconnects. The arrows indicate the direction of data flow.
5

31	  // {{{ Control counter
32	  // This counter is used to determine when to assert o_validResult and sets up
33	  // the necessary control signals.

35	  // Number of clock cycles required to complete matrix multiplication.
36	  localparam int unsigned MULT_CYCLES = 3*N-2;
37	  // `+1` to support counter_q + 1;
38	  localparam int unsigned MULT_CYCLES_W = $clog2(MULT_CYCLES+1);
39	
40	  logic [MULT_CYCLES_W-1:0] counter_d, counter_q;
41	
42	  always_ff @(posedge i_clk, posedge i_arst)
43	    if (i_arst)

45	    else

51	    else

55	  // process.
56	  logic validResult_q;
57

59	    if (i_arst)
60	      validResult_q <= '0;
61	    else if (counter_q == MULT_CYCLES_W'(MULT_CYCLES))
62	      validResult_q <= '1;
63	    else

65

# `make all` OR `make verilate` -> `make build` -> `make sim` -> `make waves`

TOP_MODULE=topSystolicArray
RTL_PATH=../rtl

.PHONY: all
all: clean verilate build sim waves

.PHONY: verilate
verilate: .stamp.verilate

.PHONY: build
build: obj_dir/VtopSystolicArray

.PHONY: sim
sim: waveform.vcd

.PHONY: waves
waves: waveform.vcd
	@echo
	@echo "### WAVES ###"
	gtkwave waveform.vcd

waveform.vcd: ./obj_dir/V$(TOP_MODULE)
	@echo
	@echo "### SIMULATING ###"
	@./obj_dir/V$(TOP_MODULE) +verilator+rand+reset+2

./obj_dir/V$(TOP_MODULE): .stamp.verilate
	@echo
	@echo "### BUILDING SIM ###"
	make -C obj_dir -f V$(TOP_MODULE).mk V$(TOP_MODULE)

.stamp.verilate: $(RTL_PATH)/$(TOP_MODULE).sv tb_$(TOP_MODULE).cpp
	@echo
	@echo "### VERILATING ###"
	verilator -Wall --trace --x-assign unique --x-initial unique -cc -I../rtl/ $(RTL_PATH)/$(TOP_MODULE).sv --exe tb_$(TOP_MODULE).cpp
	@touch .stamp.verilate

.PHONY: lint
lint: $(RTL_PATH)/$(TOP_MODULE).sv
	verilator --lint-only -I../rtl/ $(RTL_PATH)/$(TOP_MODULE).sv

.PHONY: clean
clean:
	rm -rf .stamp.*;
	rm -rf ./obj_dir
	rm -rf waveform.vcd

I now have a thorough understanding of the project. Let me also quickly check the git log for the recent changes to understand the project evolution (the recent commits mention "upper bound check", "Add comment to explain when the signal is asserted"). Let me confirm the git HEAD.

The project is a hardware design (SystemVerilog RTL) project implementing a 2D Systolic Array Matrix Multiplier. Let me summarize my understanding:

**Project**: 2D-Systolic-Array-Multiplier
- A SystemVerilog RTL implementation of a 2D systolic array that multiplies two square matrices (2 < N < 17, though the param check now says N < 257).
- Files:
  - `rtl/pe.sv` - Processing Element (PE): 8-bit multiply-accumulate (MAC). Has i_a, i_b inputs, o_a, o_b outputs (registered, passthrough), o_y output (accumulator). i_doProcess controls accumulation.
  - `rtl/systolicArray.sv` - Interconnects N×N PEs. rowInterConnect (horizontal) and colInterConnect (vertical). Uses generate loops.
  - `rtl/topSystolicArray.sv` - Top level. Parameter N=4. Has param check (N>2, N<257). Control counter (MULT_CYCLES = 3N-2). doProcess clock gate. Set-up row/col matrices (transformation with inversion + zero padding + shifting).
  - `tb/tb_topSystolicArray.cpp` - C++ Verilator testbench. Random NxN matrices, drives DUT, verifies result.

input.rationale: 本项目是一个用 SystemVerilog 实现的二维脉动阵列矩阵乘法器，规模小但层次清晰（PE→阵列互联→顶层→C++ 测试台→Quartus FPGA 工程），因此学习路线按“由外到内、由原理到实现、由仿真到综合”的顺序展开。入门层先用 README 与构建脚本让读者跑通仿真并建立对顶层接口的整体认知；进阶层自底向上拆解 PE 乘加、阵列 generate 互联、行/列矩阵变换与控制时序四个核心源码模块；专家层覆盖 Verilator 验证方法学、参数化与 SystemVerilog 编码风格、Quartus FPGA 综合资源利用以及二次开发实践。各讲义以真实源码文件为单位拆分，依赖关系遵循“先整体后局部、先模块后系统”，确保读者每一步都能对照源码与波形动手实践。

units.title: 入门：认识项目与跑通仿真

lectures.title: 项目定位与脉动阵列原理
lectures.topic: 介绍本项目要解决什么问题——用脉动阵列（systolic array）硬件加速两个方阵的乘法，以及脉动架构“数据流动 + 局部通信”的基本思想。
learning_goals: 理解矩阵乘法在硬件上的计算瓶颈与并行加速思路
了解脉动阵列的数据流动与 PE 局部通信思想
知道本项目与 Google TPU 等真实实现的关联，以及 8 位输入/32 位输出的位宽取舍
minimal_modules: 项目定位与 TL;DR（可配置乘 2<N<17 方阵）
脉动架构背景与数据流思想
输入/输出位宽选择与神经网络精度取舍
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README 的 Design Outline，画出 4x4 输入矩阵经过行/列变换后被送入阵列的示意图，并用自己的话解释为什么脉动阵列适合做矩阵乘法。

lectures.title: 仓库结构与仿真运行
lectures.topic: 介绍仓库的目录结构、依赖工具（Verilator + GNU Make），以及如何用 `cd tb && make all` 跑通 verilate→build→sim→waves 完整流程。
learning_goals: 了解 rtl/tb/FPGA/images 各目录的职责
掌握用 Verilator + Make 编译并仿真 SystemVerilog RTL 的完整流程
理解 Makefile 中 verilate/build/sim/waves/clean/lint 各阶段的作用
minimal_modules: 目录结构与运行依赖（Verilator/GNU Make）
Makefile 的 verilate→build→sim→waves 流水线
clean/lint 目标与生成文件管理
lectures.practice_task: 在本地安装 Verilator 后执行 `cd tb && make all`，观察控制台输出与生成的 waveform.vcd，记录每个 make 目标实际触发的命令。

lectures.title: 顶层接口与数据流总览
lectures.topic: 从 topSystolicArray.sv 的端口表出发，讲清楚从 i_validInput 到 o_validResult 的整体数据通路与控制握手。
learning_goals: 读懂 topSystolicArray 的端口（i_a/i_b/i_validInput/o_c/o_validResult）与时钟/异步复位约定
理解 validInput→矩阵变换→阵列→validResult 的整体流程
对照 README 波形图理解顶层接口时序
minimal_modules: 顶层端口与时钟/复位约定
validInput→变换→阵列→validResult 整体通路
接口时序波形对照
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README 的 Design Outline 与 topSystolicArray 端口，画出从输入到输出的模块级数据通路框图，标注关键控制信号与时钟/复位。

units.title: 进阶：核心 RTL 模块

lectures.title: 处理单元 PE 的乘加运算
lectures.topic: 逐行讲解 pe.sv 如何用 8 位乘法与 32 位累加器实现 MAC，以及输入寄存器如何向相邻 PE 传递数据。
learning_goals: 理解 PE 的 MAC（乘加）数据通路（mult / mac_q / o_y）
掌握 i_doProcess 如何控制累加与寄存器更新
理解 o_a/o_b 寄存器输出在阵列中的流水传递作用
minimal_modules: MAC 通路（mult、mac_q/mac_d、o_y）
输入寄存与 o_a/o_b 透传
i_doProcess 门控与异步复位
lectures.practice_task: 在纸上跟踪一个 PE 在 i_doProcess 拉高 3 个周期内 mac_q 的累加值，并解释当 i_doProcess 为低时 mac_d 与寄存器会发生什么。

lectures.title: 阵列互联与 generate 生成
lectures.topic: 讲解 systolicArray.sv 如何用嵌套 generate 把 N×N 个 PE 连成二维阵列，以及水平/垂直互连网的数据流向。
learning_goals: 理解二维阵列的水平(row)与垂直(col)互连结构
掌握 SystemVerilog generate/genvar 批量实例化的写法
理解 dummy interconnect 如何把行/列矩阵接入首行首列 PE
minimal_modules: rowInterConnect / colInterConnect 互连网结构
PerDummyRowColInterconnect 首行首列接入
PerRow/PerCol 嵌套 generate 实例化 PE
lectures.practice_task: 参考 systolicArray.sv 的注释，为 4x4 阵列手画 rowInterConnect 与 colInterConnect 的连接关系，标出每个 PE 的 i_a/i_b/o_a/o_b 连接。

lectures.title: 行/列矩阵变换
lectures.topic: 讲解 topSystolicArray.sv 的 set-up 段如何对输入矩阵做元素反转、补零、按行移位，构造出驱动阵列的行/列矩阵。
learning_goals: 理解为什么要把输入矩阵变换为带偏移的行/列矩阵
掌握 invertedRowElements/invertedColElements 的反转逻辑
理解补零(APPEND_ZERO)与按 i*8 左移对齐、每周期右移 8 位的实现
minimal_modules: 行/列矩阵变换的整体目标
元素反转 (invertedRow/ColElements)
补零与按 i*8 左移 / 每周期右移 8 位
lectures.practice_task: 取一个具体的 4x4 输入矩阵，按 row_d/col_d 的逻辑手动算出第一周期送入阵列首列的元素值，并与 README 的 matrixTransformation 示意图对照。

lectures.title: 控制计数器与时钟门控
lectures.topic: 讲解 topSystolicArray.sv 的控制段：用计数器决定 3N-2 个周期的乘法时长，并生成 doProcess 门控与 validResult。
learning_goals: 理解 MULT_CYCLES = 3N-2 的由来与计数器实现
掌握 doProcess 时钟门控的置位/保持/清零逻辑
理解 o_validResult 的判定时序
minimal_modules: 参数检查 N_VALID
控制计数器 counter_q 与 MULT_CYCLES
doProcess 门控与 validResult 生成
lectures.practice_task: 对于 N=4，计算 MULT_CYCLES 与计数器位宽 MULT_CYCLES_W，画出 doProcess_d/counter_q/validResult_q 在一次乘法过程中的时序图。

units.title: 专家：验证、参数化、FPGA 与扩展

lectures.title: Verilator C++ 测试平台
lectures.topic: 讲解 tb_topSystolicArray.cpp 如何产生随机矩阵、驱动 DUT 端口、计算期望结果并比对校验，以及波形 dump 的设置。
learning_goals: 理解 Verilator C++ 测试平台的主循环与时钟生成
掌握把矩阵打包成 Verilator 32 位数组端口的方法
理解期望结果计算与错误比对、VCD 波形 dump 流程
minimal_modules: 主循环、复位与 validInput 时序
随机矩阵生成与端口打包驱动 (driveInputMatrices)
期望结果计算与校验 (verifyOutputMatrix) + 波形 dump
lectures.practice_task: 修改测试平台，把随机输入改为固定的一对 3x3 矩阵（同时把 N 宏改为 3、RTL 参数 N 改为 3），运行仿真并确认 o_c 与手算期望一致。

lectures.title: 参数化设计与 SystemVerilog 编码风格
lectures.topic: 总结整个设计用到的参数化与 SystemVerilog 编码风格：参数 N、packed 多维数组、generate、编译期参数检查、default_nettype/`resetall 等。
learning_goals: 掌握用参数 N 驱动整个阵列规模的参数化设计
理解 packed 多维数组在端口与互连中的用法
了解 default_nettype none / `resetall / $error 等编码约定与编译期参数检查
minimal_modules: 参数 N 与编译期检查 (N_VALID / $error)
packed 多维数组端口
default_nettype none / `resetall 编码约定
lectures.practice_task: 把 RTL 参数 N 与 TB 宏 N 同时从 4 改为 6，重新跑通仿真，观察接口位宽与 MULT_CYCLES 的变化，并记录需要同步修改的所有位置。

lectures.title: Quartus FPGA 综合与资源利用
lectures.topic: 讲解 FPGA/ 目录下的 Quartus 工程（.qpf/.qsf）如何把设计综合到 Cyclone V（5CSEMA5F31C6），以及资源利用、DSP 映射与 SV2005 兼容性 caveat。
learning_goals: 理解 Quartus 工程文件 .qpf/.qsf 的关键赋值（FAMILY/DEVICE/TOP_LEVEL_ENTITY/源文件）
了解综合到 Cyclone V 后 ALM/DSP/寄存器等资源利用情况
理解 SV2005 对 for 循环语法兼容性的影响，以及 Yosys 开源流程遇到 packed 数据类型的问题
minimal_modules: .qsf 工程赋值（FAMILY/DEVICE/TOP_LEVEL_ENTITY/SYSTEMVERILOG_FILE）
Cyclone V 综合与资源利用 / DSP 映射
SV2005 for 循环语法 caveat 与 Yosys 限制
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 .qsf 与 README 的 Further Work，解释为什么 PE 数量与 DSP 利用数一一对应，并说明若改用 Yosys 开源流程会遇到 packed 数据类型的什么问题。

lectures.title: 进阶实践：修改与扩展设计
lectures.topic: 综合所学，提出若干二次开发实践方向：安全修改阵列规模、把无符号 MAC 改为有符号乘法、以及对接 SIMD 处理器接口的进一步工作。
learning_goals: 能够在现有参数化框架上安全地修改阵列规模并同步更新测试
理解把无符号 MAC 改为有符号运算需要改动的地方（符号扩展、位宽）
了解向 SIMD 处理器接口扩展的设计思路
minimal_modules: 修改阵列规模 N 的完整改动点
有符号乘法改造（位宽/符号扩展）
对接 SIMD 处理器接口的进一步工作
lectures.practice_task: 将 pe.sv 的乘加改为支持有符号 8 位输入（注意符号扩展与位宽），并修改测试平台生成含负数的输入，跑通仿真验证有符号矩阵乘法结果正确。

lectures.title: Verilator C++ 测试平台
lectures.topic: 讲解 tb_topSystolicArray.cpp 如何产生随机矩阵、驱动 DUT 端口、计算期望结果并比对校验，以及波形 dump 的设置。
learning_goals: 理解 Verilator C++ 测试平台的主循环与时钟生成
掌握把矩阵打包成 Verilator 32 位数组端口的方法
理解期望结果计算与错误比对、VCD 波形 dump 流程
minimal_modules: 主循环、复位与 validInput 时序
随机矩阵生成与端口打包驱动 (driveInputMatrices)
期望结果计算与校验 (verifyOutputMatrix) + 波形 dump
lectures.practice_task: 修改测试平台，把随机输入改为固定的一对 3x3 矩阵（同时把 N 宏改为 3、RTL 参数 N 改为 3），运行仿真并确认 o_c 与手算期望一致。

lectures.title: 参数化设计与 SystemVerilog 编码风格
lectures.topic: 总结整个设计用到的参数化与 SystemVerilog 编码风格：参数 N、packed 多维数组、generate、编译期参数检查、default_nettype/`resetall 等。
learning_goals: 掌握用参数 N 驱动整个阵列规模的参数化设计
理解 packed 多维数组在端口与互连中的用法
了解 default_nettype none / `resetall / $error 等编码约定与编译期参数检查
minimal_modules: 参数 N 与编译期检查 (N_VALID / $error)
packed 多维数组端口
default_nettype none / `resetall 编码约定
lectures.practice_task: 把 RTL 参数 N 与 TB 宏 N 同时从 4 改为 6，重新跑通仿真，观察接口位宽与 MULT_CYCLES 的变化，并记录需要同步修改的所有位置。

lectures.title: Quartus FPGA 综合与资源利用
lectures.topic: 讲解 FPGA/ 目录下的 Quartus 工程（.qpf/.qsf）如何把设计综合到 Cyclone V（5CSEMA5F31C6），以及资源利用、DSP 映射与 SV2005 兼容性 caveat。
learning_goals: 理解 Quartus 工程文件 .qpf/.qsf 的关键赋值（FAMILY/DEVICE/TOP_LEVEL_ENTITY/源文件）
了解综合到 Cyclone V 后 ALM/DSP/寄存器等资源利用情况
理解 SV2005 对 for 循环语法兼容性的影响，以及 Yosys 开源流程遇到 packed 数据类型的问题
minimal_modules: .qsf 工程赋值（FAMILY/DEVICE/TOP_LEVEL_ENTITY/SYSTEMVERILOG_FILE）
Cyclone V 综合与资源利用 / DSP 映射
SV2005 for 循环语法 caveat 与 Yosys 限制
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 .qsf 与 README 的 Further Work，解释为什么 PE 数量与 DSP 利用数一一对应，并说明若改用 Yosys 开源流程会遇到 packed 数据类型的什么问题。

lectures.title: 进阶实践：修改与扩展设计
lectures.topic: 综合所学，提出若干二次开发实践方向：安全修改阵列规模、把无符号 MAC 改为有符号乘法、以及对接 SIMD 处理器接口的进一步工作。
learning_goals: 能够在现有参数化框架上安全地修改阵列规模并同步更新测试
理解把无符号 MAC 改为有符号运算需要改动的地方（符号扩展、位宽）
了解向 SIMD 处理器接口扩展的设计思路
minimal_modules: 修改阵列规模 N 的完整改动点
有符号乘法改造（位宽/符号扩展）
对接 SIMD 处理器接口的进一步工作
lectures.practice_task: 将 pe.sv 的乘加改为支持有符号 8 位输入（注意符号扩展与位宽），并修改测试平台生成含负数的输入，跑通仿真验证有符号矩阵乘法结果正确。
